---
title: "SenMayo Scores PT_BPD"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-26"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

df <- data.frame(
  Cell_Type = c(
    "AT1", "AT2", "PERICYTES", "ALVEOLAR FIBROBLASTS",
    "SMOOTH MUSCLE", "MYOFIBROBLASTS",
    "NK CELLS", "CLASSICAL MONOCYTES",
    "MAST CELLS", "CD4 T CELLS"
  ),
  Score = c(0.5, 1.3, 0.8, 1.2, 0.5, 1.25, -0.4, -0.5, -1, -1)
)

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Cell_Type = factor(Cell_Type, levels = Cell_Type),
    Color = ifelse(Score >= 0, "Positive", "Negative"),
    label_y = ifelse(Score >= 0, 0, 0.05),
    label_hjust = ifelse(Score >= 0, 0, 1)
  )

p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Cell_Type, y = Score, fill = Color)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Positive" = "red", "Negative" = "blue")) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_text(
    data = df,
    aes(x = Cell_Type, y = label_y, label = Cell_Type, hjust = label_hjust),
    angle = 270,
    vjust = 0.5,
    size = 5,
    fontface = "bold",
    color = "black",
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Sen Mayo Scores Comparing\nPT_BPD vs ALVEOLAR vs SACCULAR",
    x = NULL,
    y = "SENSCORE"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", color = "purple", size = 16),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

p
```
